name: FSx for ONTAP — Forensic Investigation
description: DII Storage Workload Security equivalent: user activity timeline, file access audit trail, affected volumes, client IP analysis. Deploy after audit log pipeline is shipping to Sumo Logic.
title: FSx for ONTAP — Forensic Investigation

panels.title: User Activity Timeline

queries.queryString:
_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "user", "operation", "svm" 
| where !isBlank(user) 
| where user = "{{user}}" 
| timeslice 5m 
| count by _timeslice, operation 
| sort _timeslice asc

panels.description: Step 1: Activity volume for a specific user over time

panels.title: All Activity (Event Stream)

queries.queryString:
_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "user", "operation", "path", "client_ip", "result", "svm", "volume" 
| where user = "{{user}}" OR "{{user}}" = "*" 
| fields _messagetime, user, operation, path, client_ip, result, svm, volume 
| sort _messagetime desc 
| limit 500

panels.description: Step 2: Full event stream for user/time window

panels.title: Client IP — Access Origins

queries.queryString:
_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "user", "client_ip", "operation", "path" 
| where user = "{{user}}" OR "{{user}}" = "*" 
| count, count_distinct(path) as unique_files by client_ip 
| sort _count desc

panels.description: Step 3: Identify access source IPs, detect unusual origins

panels.title: File Entity History

queries.queryString:
_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "user", "operation", "path", "client_ip", "result", "svm" 
| where path = "{{path}}" 
| fields _messagetime, user, operation, client_ip, result, svm 
| sort _messagetime desc 
| limit 200

panels.description: Step 4: All operations on a specific file path

queries.queryString:
_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "volume", "operation" 
| where !isBlank(volume) 
| count by volume 
| sort _count desc 
| limit 10

_sourceCategory=fsxn* 
| json field=_raw "event_type", "message_name", "svm" 
| where message_name matches "*arw*" OR message_name matches "*ARP*" OR event_type matches "*ARP*" 
| timeslice 5m 
| count by _timeslice 
| sort _timeslice asc

sourceDefinition.query: _sourceCategory=fsxn* | json field=_raw "user" | count by user | fields user
_sourceCategory=fsxn* | json field=_raw "path" | count by path | fields path | limit 100
